bounded_scope: Generate scoped student archive manifest artifacts from persisted rows, stream them through authorized export downloads, and add expired-package retry behavior without direct Figma work or live Drive credentials.
changes: Added migration 0007_archive_export_artifacts.sql for scoped archive manifest artifacts.
Added functions/_lib/archive-export.ts to build storage-ID-redacted student archive manifests from persisted progress and evidence rows.
Updated /api/admin/exports/student-archive to generate a completed export plus export_artifacts row with content hash, byte length, expiry, reason, and audit metadata.
Updated /api/exports/:id/download to stream unexpired JSON manifests for admin/scoped users and to audit missing artifact, expired package, and successful download states.
Updated /api/student/archive/readiness to report scoped manifest readiness, download URL, expiry, and expired-package state without exposing storage identifiers.
Updated workspace.js to render a manifest download link when scoped archive package download is ready.
Expanded archive, workspace, and production-workflow source tests.

validation.result: pass; 141 passing tests and 3 expected opt-in local-server skips
pass; static Cloudflare verification passed and live verification blocked only by missing CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
pass; HTTP 200 contained data-archive-download="manifest" on poll 4 after push

blockers.cause: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set for non-interactive Pages/D1 deployment, secret inspection, and remote migration verification.
blockers.next_safe_action: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token or run remote migration/deployment verification manually.

blockers.cause: New migration 0007_archive_export_artifacts.sql was validated locally by tests but not applied or verified against remote D1.
blockers.next_safe_action: Apply/verify migration 0007 remotely once Cloudflare token access is available.

blockers.cause: This slice generates scoped JSON archive manifests; Drive-backed package files or signed-link delivery still needs live Drive credential secrets and follow-up implementation.
blockers.next_safe_action: Configure Google Drive credential secrets, then implement/verify Drive-backed archive package delivery with fake .test accounts only.

next_actions: Apply and verify migration 0007_archive_export_artifacts.sql remotely when CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is available.
Add Drive-backed package files or signed-link delivery for archive artifacts after Drive credentials are configured.
Add provider-unavailable archive generation states and retention policy documentation.
Verify hosted Archive manifest generation/download after deployment and migration apply.

phone_tracker.reason: Google Sheets connector was not used in this run; repo-local closeout evidence was preserved.
